
### unfortunate things C programmers do (4) 

in code generated by `f2c` (Fortran to C translator and cleaned up slightly)

```c
float sum(int size, float *arr) {
    arr = arr - 1; /* <-- deliberately out-of-bounds pointer */
    float result = 0.f;
    for (i = 1; i <= size; ++i) {
        result += arr[i]
    }
    return result;
}

```
